meaning: n.以文字损害名誉,诽谤罪,侮辱v.诽谤,中伤,诬蔑,损害名誉
examples: Mr. Warren sued for libel over the remarks.
Warren sued him for libel over the remarks.
Canadian libel law is based on English common law.
The cabinet also approved plans to drop prison sentences for journalists convicted of libel.
It was a very good example of the injustice of the English libel laws.
